case_title: OLMAN ALVAREZ MATAMOROS VS. DAYSI JAENZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH-LANGUAGE INTERPRETERS FOR BOTH SIDES TO NOV-09-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OLMAN ALVAREZ MATAMOROS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAYSI JAENZ DBA PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL IS NOT PRESENT, BUT JOSE ZALDANA IS PRESENT AS DEFENDANT DAYSI JAENZ'S HUSBAND/PARTNER. BOTH SIDES INDICATE THE NEED FOR ASSISTANCE OF A SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER AND NO COURT INTERPRETERS ARE AVAILABLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVED) SERVED AUG-29-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JAENZ, DAYSI DBA PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MATAMOROS, OLMAN ALVAREZ AS TO DEFENDANT JAENZ, DAYSI DBA PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETERS FOR BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSE ZALDANA (PARTNER/HUSBAND) FILED BY DEFENDANT JAENZ, DAYSI DBA PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATAMOROS, OLMAN ALVAREZ ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OLMAN ALVAREZ MATAMOROS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAYSI JAENZ DBA PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL IS NOT PRESENT, BUT JOSE ZALDANA IS PRESENT AS DEFENDANT DAYSI JAENZ'S HUSBAND/PARTNER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JAN-19-2024 ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
